title: The power of the Angels
wikitext:
[]: The power of the Angels             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Nov 21, 2006 12:49 am Adam --STRONGEST! we assume Adam is the strongest...he is the source of the Angels...and his shockwave melted Antartica and killed off half the earths population...however we do not know if this was just because of him being embrywnd...we can certainly assume he is at least as powerful as but most likey much more powerful than the Evas which are born from him...theres a theory that his power is only limited by his imagination... Lilith --2nd? At first im like "Lilith blew up earth...she wins..."...but that was AFTER she merged with Adam and Rei and blah blah...Assuming that the complete origianl Lilith is as big as we see in that chamber...she seems a bit bigger than Eva...We are never provided with evidence as what power she possesses except for Unit 01...it would seem that since Unit 01 is made from her, that the logical conlusion would be that, if she were not bound to the cross, she would posses more power than 01 (which has clearly demonstrated superiority over the Angels...cept Adam and perhaps Ramiel) Ramiel this seems to be the most powerful Angel we get to really see in fighting action...It's AT Feild appears to be the most powerful...penetrated only by all the electrical power in Japan...anything within range is immedietly shot...with perfect accuracy...with a beam powerful enough to melt the Armor around the Evas in seconds, not to mention Spaceshi heat sheilding...meaning the beam is significantly hotter than any object that falls into the earth's atmosphere...Rameil is a perfect flying "fortress"...with no known weaknesses...It's uncertain if even Berserker could defeat Ramiel on it's own... Arael Arael is very difficult ot place due to its uniqueness... Equating the amount of time Unit 02 held off the Lance of Longinus vs how long it did...it would seem that Arael's AT Feild is a little stronger than Unit 02's. It's ability to rape the mind of it's victims is undoubtly powerful from afar...but its hard to tell how big it is...and we dont know how tough it would be if it got some balls and tried to fight right in front Asuka... Sachiel Sachiel is actually quite strong considering hes the "first boss fight"...I really cant think of a word to describe those rod things sticing out of his arms...pistons?...either that certainly seems like a powerfull attack...he also has a laser beam that penetrates the geofront...lastlly is his odd ability to increase his muscle mass...its powerful enough to break Eva's arm wich definitely counts for something...its power actually seems not much less than that of Zeruel... Matariel --WEAKEST while there may be abilities that we never see due to the situation, it would appear that Matariel is a complete wimp...his AT Feild is certainly weakest since it was dispelled enough to let the Machine Gun penetrate...Despite what appears to be a larg size...he does not seem to move quickly and there is no evidence to suggest he has any abilities other than his acid eyes im sleepy and dont feel like doing them all right now...you can all make you endless corrections...or itd be nice if we had some hard data...like the exact heat of Ramiel's beam for example... itd be neat if we could put the Angels in oder by weakest to strongest

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 21, 2006 1:04 am Rei's ATF pwns Kaworu. I get the general feeling that Lilith pwns Adam. (She would certainly be very difficult to defeat in hand-to-hand combat.) This thread straddles the fine line between Chit-Chat and Discussion.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Tue Nov 21, 2006 1:43 am Yeah, I sorta think Lilith is more powerful than Adam, too. After all, she was the one that ended up getting to seed the earth while Adam just gets skewered and goes to sleep (however the hell that happened). And then there's the fact that Eva-01's so special because she's Lilith's "bunshin", whereas all the others are "just" Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 21, 2006 1:46 am From the dialogue, and what we're presented in the show, I always assumed Adam and Lilith are on equal footing. I've seen nothing to siggest otherwise.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 21, 2006 2:03 am The Eva Monkey wrote: From the dialogue, and what we're presented in the show, I always assumed Adam and Lilith are on equal footing. I've seen nothing to siggest otherwise.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Nov 21, 2006 2:32 am What about Zeruel, that guy is a fucking BADASS, I mean, he kicked everyone's ass, except for Yui's.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Nov 21, 2006 2:35 am this leaves open an idea in my head over wiether or not Yui could beat Adam in a fight...thats such a fun thought to imagine the Eva pilots fighting him...its how i thought the series would end when i first watched... so i guess this means that Lilith is more powerful than Adam... Im not sure about Leliel...its hard to catagorize...same with Armisael... And Bardiel would obviously be strengthend based soley on the strength of whatever it possesses i suppose this is bound to become a "Which Angel would win in a fight" thread...so you should probly move it to chit-chat and like i said before...Zeruel seemed not to be much tougher than Sachiel...in fact...it took a lot more effort for Yui to whip Sachiel than it did Zeruel...at least Shinji wouldve beaten Zeruel on his own if Eva hadnt run out of energy

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 21, 2006 2:46 am master0rolando wrote: this leaves open an idea in my head over wiether or not Yui could beat Adam in a fight...thats such a fun thought to imagine the Eva pilots fighting him...its how i thought the series would end when i first watched...

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Nov 21, 2006 3:11 am master0rolando wrote: and like i said before...Zeruel seemed not to be much tougher than Sachiel...in fact...it took a lot more effort for Yui to whip Sachiel than it did Zeruel...at least Shinji wouldve beaten Zeruel on his own if Eva hadnt run out of energy

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 25, 2006 5:45 pm where the hell is Zaruel in all that list!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by directedition » Sat Nov 25, 2006 9:10 pm I was say Adam and Lilith are equal, seeing as how they were initially created equal.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 25, 2006 9:16 pm directedition wrote: I was say Adam and Lilith are equal, seeing as how they were initially created equal.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 26, 2006 2:24 am Reichu's insistance that Lilith is stronger is born from her love of "DotS".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 26, 2006 3:11 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Reichu's insistance that Lilith is stronger is born from her love of "DotS".

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 26, 2006 3:15 am actually...Rei wasnt a complete Lilith...she may have had the whole of Lilith's soul...but i certainly dont think her AT Feild was as strongs when she merged with Lilith...(not counting Embryadam) Its also doubtful that Kaworu, despite having Adam's soul had an AT Feild as strong as Adam's... Does the body of adam and lilith count for nothing in terms of AT Feild strength

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 26, 2006 3:18 am master0rolando wrote: she may have had the whole of Lilith's soul

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 26, 2006 3:35 am Reichu wrote: I'll speak for myself, thankyouverymuch.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 26, 2006 3:48 am also, Israfel (i think thats the right 1, 7th angel right?) Israfel was a pretty good challenge being able to split into 2 its only weakness was when the 2 parts were forming bak together and the 2 cores were becoming 1

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 26, 2006 4:26 am that is hard to fight...but hed never beat Ramiel... Leliel...how would any of the angels fight Leliel?...or Iruel...(thats the computer one right?)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 26, 2006 4:41 am Sachiel_13 wrote: its only weakness was when the 2 parts were forming bak together and the 2 cores were becoming 1

Lilith --2nd? At first im like "Lilith blew up earth...she wins..."...but that was AFTER she merged with Adam and Rei and blah blah...Assuming that the complete origianl Lilith is as big as we see in that chamber...she seems a bit bigger than Eva...We are never provided with evidence as what power she possesses except for Unit 01...it would seem that since Unit 01 is made from her, that the logical conlusion would be that, if she were not bound to the cross, she would posses more power than 01 (which has clearly demonstrated superiority over the Angels...cept Adam and perhaps Ramiel) Ramiel this seems to be the most powerful Angel we get to really see in fighting action...It's AT Feild appears to be the most powerful...penetrated only by all the electrical power in Japan...anything within range is immedietly shot...with perfect accuracy...with a beam powerful enough to melt the Armor around the Evas in seconds, not to mention Spaceshi heat sheilding...meaning the beam is significantly hotter than any object that falls into the earth's atmosphere...Rameil is a perfect flying "fortress"...with no known weaknesses...It's uncertain if even Berserker could defeat Ramiel on it's own... Arael Arael is very difficult ot place due to its uniqueness... Equating the amount of time Unit 02 held off the Lance of Longinus vs how long it did...it would seem that Arael's AT Feild is a little stronger than Unit 02's. It's ability to rape the mind of it's victims is undoubtly powerful from afar...but its hard to tell how big it is...and we dont know how tough it would be if it got some balls and tried to fight right in front Asuka
